steps.title: Read the colon as a clue
steps.content: The colon defines the blank: the terraces, canals, and water temples are "joined together into a single cohesive unit." The blank must mean linked together as parts of one system.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A means out of date, choice B means casual or unofficial, and choice D means not required. None expresses parts being joined into one unit. The remaining choice means mutually connected. The answer is C.
